# ICReturnMetadataError.Code.notAvailable

**Case**

Item does not have metadata available.

## Declaration

```swift
case notAvailable
```

## Error Cases

- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.alreadyFetching**: Item metadata request is being serviced.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.canceled**: Item metadata request has been canceled.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.invalid**: Item metadata request completed with invalid result.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.alreadyFetching**: Item metadata request is being serviced.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.canceled**: Item metadata request has been canceled.
- **ICReturnMetadataError.Code.invalid**: Item metadata request completed with invalid result.
